svg.title: Phone-as-Touchpad System Architecture
svg.desc: Architecture diagram showing how a phone connects to a laptop as a touchpad over local network, with server, client, and communication layers.
svg.text: Phone as touchpad — full system overview

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the .exe launcher work for the touchpad server?')
sendPrompt('What does the WebSocket server do in this touchpad app?')
sendPrompt('How is input injected into the OS from the touchpad server?')
sendPrompt('How is the QR code and access code generated for pairing?')
sendPrompt('Why does the laptop serve a web page for the phone client?')
sendPrompt('How does the server detect its own LAN IP address?')

g.text: Local WiFi network (same router — no internet needed)

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What protocol is used over WiFi for the touchpad?')
sendPrompt('Why is WebSocket chosen over HTTP polling for touchpad input?')
sendPrompt('How does the phone discover the laptop server on the network?')
sendPrompt('How does the touch surface work on the phone for the touchpad?')
sendPrompt('What gestures should the touchpad app support?')
sendPrompt('How does the phone WebSocket client send touch data?')
sendPrompt('How does the virtual keyboard panel work in the touchpad app?')
sendPrompt('What media controls should the phone touchpad app support?')
sendPrompt('How does haptic feedback work in the phone touchpad app?')
sendPrompt('How does the QR code scanner work for pairing?')
sendPrompt('How should the app handle reconnection if WiFi drops?')
sendPrompt('What happens when the phone loses connection to the laptop?')
sendPrompt('How do I build a Windows .exe for the touchpad server?')
sendPrompt('How do I build a Mac .app for the touchpad server?')
sendPrompt('How do I build the Android APK for the touchpad client?')
sendPrompt('What is the best tech stack for building this touchpad app?')
g.text: No Python or runtime install required — double-click and run
